heading: Short title
label: 1461 Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Home Owners’ Loan Act.”
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of the first sentence of section 1 of act . The remainder of section 1 of the Act included a table of contents for the Act.June 13, 1933
Amendments1989— amended section generally, striking out “of 1933” after “Act”.Pub. L. 101–73

Effective Date of 1989 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 101–73, title III, § 305(c)103 Stat. 352Aug. 9, 1989“The amendments made by section 301 [amending this chapter] relating to civil penalties shall apply with respect to violations committed and activities engaged in after the date of the enactment of this Act [], except that the increased maximum civil penalties of $5,000 and $25,000 per violation or per day may apply to such violations or activities committed or engaged in before such date with respect to an institution if such violations or activities—Aug. 9, 1989“(1)are not already subject to a notice issued by the appropriate Federal banking agency or the Board (initiating an administrative proceeding); and“(2)occurred after the completion of the last report of examination of the institution by the appropriate Federal banking agency (as defined in section 3 of the Federal Deposit Insurance Act []) occurring before the date of the enactment of this Act.”12 U.S.C. 1813

Short Title of 1998 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 105–164, § 1112 Stat. 32Mar. 20, 1998“This Act [enacting , amending sections 1464 and 1818 of this title, and enacting provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Examination Parity and Year 2000 Readiness for Financial Institutions Act’.”section 1786a of this titlesection 1811 of this title

Short Title of 1991 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–242, title IV, § 436105 Stat. 2381Dec. 19, 1991“This subtitle [subtitle G (§§ 436–441) of title IV of , amending sections 1464 and 1467a of this title] may be cited as the ‘Qualified Thrift Lender Reform Act of 1991’.”Pub. L. 102–242

Short Title of 1982 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 97–320, title III, § 30196 Stat. 1496Oct. 15, 1982“This title [enacting , amending sections 1425a, 1426, 1428a, 1430, 1464, 1725, 1730a, 1841, and 3503 of this title, enacting provisions set out as a note under , and repealing provisions set out as a note under ] may be cited as the ‘Thrift Institutions Restructuring Act’.”section 1701j–3 of this titlesection 3503 of this titlesection 461 of this title
